Finance Dashboard UI Assignment

Setup Checklist:
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Define Project Requirements (React, TypeScript, Vite, frontend-only dashboard)
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Project Overview:
- Frontend-only financial tracking dashboard
- Mock data stored in localStorage
- React 19, TypeScript, Vite build tool
- Chart.js for visualizations
- Responsive design (mobile + desktop)
- Role-based UI (viewer/admin demo)

Key Features:
- Transaction management (add, edit, delete, search, filter, sort)
- Balance trend and spending breakdown charts
- Budget editor with category limits
- Bills tracker
- Dark/light mode toggle
- CSV export
- Toast notifications for user feedback

To Run:
```bash
npm install
npm run dev    # Development server
npm run build  # Production build
npm run lint   # Code quality check
```

Live Site:
